name: s3db.js
description: Use AWS S3, the world's most reliable document storage, as a database with this ORM.
author: @stone/martech

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.mcp.json && node scripts/inject-version.js
scripts.test:fs: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:plugins
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:plugins:fast && pnpm run test:plugins:slow && pnpm run test:plugins:api && pnpm run test:plugins:spider
scripts.test:core: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/core/
scripts.test:plugins: pnpm run test:plugins:fast && pnpm run test:plugins:slow && pnpm run test:plugins:api && pnpm run test:plugins:spider
scripts.test:plugins:fast: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/state-machine/ tests/plugins/plugin-storage/ tests/plugins/ttl/ tests/plugins/s3-queue/
scripts.test:plugins:slow: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/scheduler/ tests/plugins/tfstate/ tests/plugins/replicator/ tests/plugins/replicators/ tests/plugins/concerns/
scripts.test:plugins:api: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/api/
scripts.test:plugins:spider: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/spider/
scripts.test:plugins:root: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --dir tests/plugins --ignore 'tests/plugins/*/'
scripts.test:memory: pnpm run test:memory:core && pnpm run test:memory:plugins && pnpm run test:ts
scripts.test:memory:core: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=true TEST_MEMORY_MAX_MB=96 node --max-old-space-size=2048 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/core/ --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:memory:quick: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=true TEST_MEMORY_MAX_MB=64 node --max-old-space-size=2048 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/core/concerns tests/core/classes tests/core/database tests/core/behaviors tests/plugins/state-machine tests/plugins/ttl tests/plugins/s3-queue --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:memory:plugins: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=true TEST_MEMORY_MAX_MB=96 node --max-old-space-size=2048 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/ --no-file-parallelism
scripts.test:s3: pnpm run test:s3:core && pnpm run test:s3:plugins && pnpm run test:ts
scripts.test:s3:core: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=false BUCKET_CONNECTION_STRING='http://minioadmin:minioadmin123@localhost:9100/s3db' node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/core/
scripts.test:s3:plugins: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=false BUCKET_CONNECTION_STRING='http://minioadmin:minioadmin123@localhost:9100/s3db' node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run tests/plugins/
scripts.test:coverage: S3DB_LOG_LEVEL=warn TEST_FORCE_MEMORY_CLIENT=false TEST_USE_FILESYSTEM_CLIENT=true node --max-old-space-size=4096 node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --coverage && pnpm run test:ts
scripts.release:check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:ts && pnpm run test:ts:runtime && pnpm run benchmark:memory:core:assert && node scripts/pack-smoke-check.js
scripts.validate:types: pnpm run test:ts && echo 'TypeScript definitions are valid!'
scripts.install:peers: pnpm add -D @aws-sdk/client-acm @aws-sdk/client-api-gateway @aws-sdk/client-apigatewayv2 @aws-sdk/client-backup @aws-sdk/client-cloudfront @aws-sdk/client-cloudtrail @aws-sdk/client-cloudwatch @aws-sdk/client-cloudwatch-logs @aws-sdk/client-cognito-identity-provider @aws-sdk/client-config-service @aws-sdk/client-dynamodb @aws-sdk/client-ec2 @aws-sdk/client-ecr @aws-sdk/client-ecs @aws-sdk/client-efs @aws-sdk/client-eks @aws-sdk/client-elasticache @aws-sdk/client-elastic-load-balancing @aws-sdk/client-elastic-load-balancing-v2 @aws-sdk/client-eventbridge @aws-sdk/client-iam @aws-sdk/client-kinesis @aws-sdk/client-kms @aws-sdk/client-lambda @aws-sdk/client-rds @aws-sdk/client-route-53 @aws-sdk/client-secrets-manager @aws-sdk/client-sfn @aws-sdk/client-sns @aws-sdk/client-sqs @aws-sdk/client-ssm @aws-sdk/client-sts @aws-sdk/client-waf @aws-sdk/client-wafv2 @google-cloud/bigquery @libsql/client @planetscale/database @tensorflow/tfjs-node amqplib bcrypt express jose nodemailer pg
scripts.install:dev:core: echo '✅ Core dependencies already installed via pnpm install'
scripts.install:dev:plugins: pnpm add -D jose bcrypt argon2 nodemailer @tensorflow/tfjs-node
scripts.install:dev:puppeteer: pnpm add -D puppeteer-extra puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth user-agents ghost-cursor
scripts.install:dev:minimal: pnpm run install:dev:core && echo '✅ Minimal dev setup complete (core only)'
scripts.install:dev:common: pnpm run install:dev:core && pnpm run install:dev:replicators && pnpm run install:dev:plugins && echo '✅ Common dev setup complete (core + replicators + plugins)'
scripts.install:dev:full: pnpm run install:dev:core && pnpm run install:dev:replicators && pnpm run install:dev:plugins && pnpm run install:dev:puppeteer && pnpm run install:dev:cloud && echo '✅ Full dev setup complete (all dependencies)'
